findings.title: Hardcoded credentials in tracked configuration file
findings.description: server.yaml contains hardcoded SMTP credentials (lines 11-12) and Firebase key file reference (line 6). These should never be committed to git.
violations: Line 11: smtp-sender-user contains AWS SES credentials
Line 12: smtp-sender-pass contains password in tracked file
findings.expected: Credentials should be referenced via 1Password format: op://vault/item/field

findings.title: Configuration file violates templating pipeline
findings.description: server.yaml should be a template file with 1Password references, not tracked with actual credentials.
violations: No generated.* pattern for gitignored output
findings.expected: Follow pipeline: mustache data.yml | envsubst | op inject > generated.yaml

findings.title: Module missing justfile
findings.description: ntfy module has no justfile for orchestration and standard recipes.
violations: No justfile present in module directory
Cannot be installed via standard just recipes
No standard recipe set (install, clean, health, etc.)
findings.expected: justfile with shell settings, standard recipes, and relative imports per ADR-002

findings.title: Incomplete module structure
findings.description: Module missing required and recommended files per standard module definition.
findings.expected: Module structure: justfile, brewfile (if needed), config template, data.yml, README.md

findings.title: Missing data.yml schema definition
findings.description: No data.yml file to define module configuration following standard schema.
findings.expected: data.yml following ADR-005 schema with port, domain, services, and custom fields

findings.title: Service module missing lifecycle recipes
findings.description: ntfy is a service module (runs background processes on ports 2586 and 25) but lacks required service recipes.
findings.expected: Service recipes with proper lifecycle management, PID files, and idempotency per ADR-007

findings.title: Missing documentation
findings.description: Module lacks README.md for documentation and clarity.
findings.expected: README.md documenting module purpose, configuration, and any deviations from ADR patterns

adr-003.details: Incomplete module structure missing justfile and documentation

adr-004.details: Configuration contains secrets that should be templated and gitignored

adr-005.details: No data.yml file for schema-based configuration

adr-007.details: Service module missing all required lifecycle recipes

beads_issues_created.title: ntfy: Create justfile with standard recipes
ntfy: Create data.yml with schema specification

recommendations: Address CRITICAL security issues first (dotfiles-adam-c4k.79.1) before any other work
Implement justfile and service recipes as foundation (dotfiles-adam-c4k.79.2, dotfiles-adam-c4k.79.5)
Follow with templating pipeline implementation (dotfiles-adam-c4k.79.3, dotfiles-adam-c4k.79.4)
